TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: panmwo:Infobox television Ha'ing de Wangkow(theluw:哈勇的王國, imi' Qalang nqu Hayon) hya ga teribi ega na Taywan. kbalay in Gencumincoku Teribi. cinbuxan ryax sa 1 na byacing tay 1 squ kawas na 2009 mhngan. biru na dorama spngan squliq ka myugi ru mqwas Hayon : skahun nha Ye Woy-ming ga myugi ru mqwas Yukan : skahun nha Jacobs Cang ga myugi ru mqwas Ryutyanhao : skahun nha U Cun ga myugi ru mqwas skahun nha Inka Mbing ga myugi ru mqwas skahun nha Ipay Buyici ga myugi ru mqwas Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Gencumincoku Teribi - 哈勇的王國
S.PHON: panmwo:in*oβox tele*is~ɕion ħaʔiŋ *e waŋkow(tħeluw:*****, imiʔ qalaŋ nqu ħajon) ħja ɣa teriβi eɣa na tajwan. kβalaj in ɣenʦ~ʨuminʦ~ʨoku teriβi. ʦ~ʨinβuxan rjax s~ɕa * na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** mħŋan. βiru na *orama s~ɕpŋan s~ɕquliq ka mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ ħajon : s~ɕkaħun nħa je woj-miŋ ɣa mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ jukan : s~ɕkaħun nħa *aʦ~ʨoβs~ɕ ʦ~ʨaŋ ɣa mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ rjutjanħao : s~ɕkaħun nħa u ʦ~ʨun ɣa mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ s~ɕkaħun nħa inka mβiŋ ɣa mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ s~ɕkaħun nħa ipaj βujiʦ~ʨi ɣa mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ɣenʦ~ʨuminʦ~ʨoku teriβi - *****
S.FORM: panmwo:Infobox television Ha'ing de Wangkow(theluw:哈勇的王國, imi' Qalang nqu Hayon) hya ga teribi ega na Taywan. kbalay in Gencumincoku Teribi. cinbuxan ryax sa 1 na byacing tay 1 squ kawas na 2009 mhngan. biru na dorama spngan squliq ka myugi ru mqwas Hayon : skahun nha Ye Woy-ming ga myugi ru mqwas Yukan : skahun nha Jacobs Cang ga myugi ru mqwas Ryutyanhao : skahun nha U Cun ga myugi ru mqwas skahun nha Inka Mbing ga myugi ru mqwas skahun nha Ipay Buyici ga myugi ru mqwas Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Gencumincoku Teribi - 哈勇的王國
S.PHON: panmwo:in*oβox tele*is~ɕion ħaʔiŋ *e waŋkow(tħeluw:*****, imiʔ qalaŋ nqu ħajon) ħja ɣa teriβi eɣa na tajwan. kβalaj in ɣenʦ~ʨuminʦ~ʨoku teriβi. ʦ~ʨinβuxan rjax s~ɕa * na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** mħŋan. βiru na *orama s~ɕpŋan s~ɕquliq ka mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ ħajon : s~ɕkaħun nħa je woj-miŋ ɣa mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ jukan : s~ɕkaħun nħa *aʦ~ʨoβs~ɕ ʦ~ʨaŋ ɣa mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ rjutjanħao : s~ɕkaħun nħa u ʦ~ʨun ɣa mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ s~ɕkaħun nħa inka mβiŋ ɣa mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ s~ɕkaħun nħa ipaj βujiʦ~ʨi ɣa mjuɣi ru mqwas~ɕ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ɣenʦ~ʨuminʦ~ʨoku teriβi - *****
